components.label: Button
components.description: Solid, outline, ghost, and link variants with loading state.

components.label: Input
components.description: Text input with error, disabled, and helper text states.

components.label: Textarea
components.description: Multi-line input with optional auto-resize.

components.label: Select
components.description: Native select with accessible custom styling.

components.label: Checkbox
components.description: Controlled checkbox with indeterminate state support.

components.label: Radio Group
components.description: Context-linked radio group with arrow key navigation.

components.label: Switch
components.description: Toggle switch with aria-checked and disabled state.

components.label: Slider
components.description: Range slider with min, max, step, and keyboard support.

components.label: Label
components.description: Accessible form label with optional required indicator.

components.label: Container
components.description: Centered content wrapper with responsive max-width presets.

components.label: Stack
components.description: Flexbox stack with direction, gap, align, and justify props.

components.label: Grid
components.description: CSS grid helper with column count and gap presets.

components.label: Divider
components.description: Horizontal or vertical rule with an optional inline label.

components.label: Tabs
components.description: Tab list and panels with roving tabindex keyboard navigation.

components.label: Breadcrumb
components.description: Navigation trail with aria-current on the active page.

components.label: Pagination
components.description: Smart page range with ellipsis and sibling configuration.

components.label: Stepper
components.description: Progress stepper with horizontal and vertical orientation.

components.label: Alert
components.description: Status message with role=alert or role=status variants.

components.label: Badge
components.description: Dot or label badge with multiple color variants.

components.label: Progress
components.description: Progress bar with full ARIA progressbar pattern.

components.label: Spinner
components.description: Animated loading indicator with a screen-reader label.

components.label: Skeleton
components.description: Shimmer placeholder in text, circular, or rectangular shapes.

components.label: Toast
components.description: Imperative toast system with auto-dismiss and aria-live.

components.label: Modal
components.description: Native dialog with free focus trap and Escape to close.

components.label: Drawer
components.description: Side sheet from right, left, or bottom using native dialog.

components.label: Tooltip
components.description: CSS hover tooltip with role=tooltip and aria-describedby.

components.label: Popover
components.description: Click-triggered floating panel with aria-expanded on trigger.

components.label: Avatar
components.description: Image with fallback initials and an online status dot.

components.label: Card
components.description: Compound card with header, body, and footer sub-components.

components.label: Table
components.description: Accessible table with scope, caption, and compound structure.

components.label: Accordion
components.description: Expandable items with single or multi-expand mode.

components.label: Tag
components.description: Inline chip with optional dismiss button and aria-label.

components.label: Carousel
components.description: Slide carousel with arrows, dots, autoPlay, and ARIA pattern.

components.label: Banner
components.description: Full-width message bar for info, success, warning, or error.

components.label: Timeline
components.description: Vertical event list with status dots and time elements.

components.label: FormField
components.description: Label + input + error message bundle with full ARIA wiring.

components.label: SearchInput
components.description: Search input with clear button and accessible controls.

components.label: NumberInput
components.description: Number input with increment/decrement and min/max clamping.
